nodes.name: Subdesert brush warbler
nodes.summary: Subdesert brush warbler（Nesillas lantzii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Subdesert brush warbler。

nodes.name: Nesillas
nodes.summary: Nesillas（Nesillas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Malagasy brush warbler、Subdesert brush warbler、Grande Comore brush warbler等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Subdesert brush warbler
nodes.summary: The subdesert brush warbler (Nesillas lantzii), also known as Lantz's brush-warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found only in Madagascar. References
